data.title: Finanza.tech Opens Third Warrant Exercise Period
data.description:
Finanza.tech S.p.A. (IT:FTC) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Finanza.tech S.p.A. has announced the opening of the third exercise period for their ‘Warrant Finanza.tech 2021-2026’, allowing warrant holders to subscribe to new ordinary shares at a price of €1.60 per share. This initiative provides an opportunity for investors to engage with the fintech company’s growth on Euronext Growth Milan, promoting increased interaction between the financial sector and real economy. Warrant holders must act by December 20, 2024, to take advantage of this offer.

For further insights into IT:FTC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EXACT Therapeutics and GE HealthCare Partner in Cancer Therapy
data.description:
EXACT Therapeutics AS (DE:56F) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

EXACT Therapeutics has secured a $7 million investment from GE HealthCare to advance its Acoustic Cluster Therapy (ACT) for pancreatic cancer. This strategic collaboration aims to support EXACT’s Phase 2 ENACT study and includes a four-year agreement for the development and supply of clinical equipment. The partnership highlights a significant step in therapeutic ultrasound, potentially transforming cancer treatment.

For further insights into DE:56F stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Wise PLC Caps CEO Voting Power Amid Shareholder Dynamics
data.description:
Wise PLC Class A (GB:WISE) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Wise PLC announces that its total voting rights stand at over 3.2 billion, with Chief Executive Officer Kristo Käärmann holding a significant portion. However, Käärmann’s voting influence is capped to ensure it remains below 50% while he is CEO. This strategic move might interest investors keeping an eye on corporate governance and shareholder dynamics.

For further insights into GB:WISE stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Lindbergh S.p.A. Expands Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Lindbergh S.p.A. (IT:LDB) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Lindbergh S.p.A., an Italian-French MRO and waste management company, has repurchased 1,500 of its own shares at an average price of 3.49 Euros each, totaling 5,240 Euros, as part of its ongoing share buyback program. The company now holds 164,365 own shares, amounting to 1.93% of its share capital, further solidifying its investment in its business strategy.

data.title: Altarea Boosts Share Liquidity with New Contract
data.description:
ALTAREA (FR:ALTA) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Altarea has entrusted Rothschild Martin Maurel with a liquidity contract to enhance the trading liquidity of its shares on Euronext Paris, effective December 2, 2024. This move comes after ending a previous contract with Kepler Cheuvreux, and is aimed at ensuring the regularity of share quotations. The contract aligns with current regulations and can be suspended or terminated under specified conditions.

data.description:

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

Deltex Medical Group has seen an increase in shareholder Michael Stubbs’ stake, now holding 6.45% of the company, following a recent purchase of shares. This development comes as Deltex continues to innovate with its TrueVue System, introducing non-invasive haemodynamic monitoring technology that could revolutionize patient care across various hospital settings. With a strategic focus on expanding its market reach, Deltex aims to establish its technology as a standard of care globally.
